texto: Now I see why you have no trouble getting laid," she said softly. Tru swallowed. "You didn't before?""No. You're kind of an asshole." "No more than anyone else," he said with a shrug. "Less than some." She frowned up at him. "But you should be better." "Why the hell would you think that?" "Because you're Tru.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ellen Davis Conner que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Now I see why you have no trouble getting laid," she said softly. Tru swallowed. "You didn't befo…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, daybreak, love, com foco em love e tru.
